title: cuphea flavisetula
intro: Cuphea flavisetula, also known as the Yellow Tower or Yellow Cuphea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cuphea flavisetula include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or infuse in oils for topical application.
